description: A reference mortgage-backed asset referencing rental-home loans across high-growth Sunbelt markets. Disclosures focus on rental coverage, geographic concentration, and refinancing assumptions.

docs.label: Collateral summary
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Summarizes rental coverage, property mix, and regional exposure assumptions.

docs.label: Servicer report
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Describes illustrative payment collection and borrower monitoring controls.

docs.label: Risk disclosure
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Lists vacancy, rate, and refinancing risks for reference review.
